title: Nelson July Fun
meta_desc: Discover Nelson and Abel Tasman in July with kids. Enjoy winter sunshine, warm days and cool nights, with average highs of 12°C. Book ahead for popular attractions like the Abel Tasman Water Taxi and Sea Kayaking.
intro: Nelson is the sunniest region in New Zealand, making it an ideal destination for a family holiday in July. With its stunning natural beauty, family-friendly atmosphere, and plenty of activities to enjoy, you'll find something for everyone. From beautiful beaches to scenic walks and exciting tours, Nelson and Abel Tasman have it all.

sections.heading: Weather in July
sections.body:
In July, Nelson and Abel Tasman experience mild winter weather, with average highs of 12°C and average lows of 2°C. It's a great time to enjoy the region's beautiful scenery without the crowds of the summer months.

While it can be cool in the mornings and evenings, the days are often sunny and warm, making it perfect for outdoor activities like hiking and beach walks.

sections.heading: What's On in July
sections.body:
July is a great time to visit Nelson and Abel Tasman, with plenty of events and activities to enjoy. The Nelson Saturday Market is a must-visit, with local produce, crafts, and live music.

The Farewell Spit Tour is another popular attraction, offering a unique glimpse into the region's stunning natural beauty and wildlife.
list: Abel Tasman Water Taxi: daily departures

sections.heading: What to Book Ahead
sections.body:
To avoid missing out on popular attractions, it's a good idea to book ahead for activities like the Abel Tasman Water Taxi and Sea Kayaking.

Accommodation can also fill up quickly, especially during school holidays, so be sure to book your accommodation well in advance.
list: Abel Tasman Water Taxi: from $40-$60 per person
Accommodation: from $150-$300 per night for a family of four

sections.heading: Crowd Levels and Tips
sections.body:
July is a relatively quiet month in Nelson and Abel Tasman, with smaller crowds than the peak summer months.

However, it's still a good idea to plan ahead and book popular attractions in advance to avoid missing out.
list: Arrive early at beaches and parks to secure parking
Pack warm clothing for cooler mornings and evenings
Don't forget sunscreen and a hat for sunny days
Check the weather forecast before heading out
